source.title: PDD Q4 2025 Earnings Call — Capital Allocation: No Buyback Despite $69.5B Cash

extractions.claim: PDD has ZERO buyback or dividend history despite accumulating ~$69.5B in cash — the most extreme case of cash hoarding in global e-commerce
extractions.evidence: As of December 31, 2025, PDD held RMB 422.3B (~$58.7B) in cash, equivalents, and short-term investments, plus RMB 104.7B in non-current deposits. Total liquid assets ~RMB 527B (~$73.2B). The company has never declared a dividend or executed a share buyback since its IPO in 2018. Management's Q4 2025 earnings call made no mention of buybacks or dividends.

verification.verifier_notes: Confirmed by reviewing all earnings call summaries and press releases. No capital return program has ever been announced by PDD Holdings.

extractions.claim: PDD's capital allocation stance is the polar opposite of BABA and JD, who have aggressively returned capital to shareholders in 2024-2025
extractions.evidence: Alibaba: spent RMB 86.7B on buybacks in FY2025, RMB 88.7B in FY2024, RMB 74.7B in FY2023. Committed to $25B buyback through March 2027. Pays $2/share annual dividend (1.47% yield). JD.com: $5B buyback program with $1.5B deployed in H1 2025. PDD: $0 returned to shareholders — ever.

verification.verifier_notes: BABA buyback figures from analyst reports and earnings releases. JD buyback from Nasdaq comparison article. PDD zero-return confirmed from all filings reviewed.

extractions.claim: Management's stated priority is 'all-in' supply chain investment for 2026, explicitly warning this will compress financial performance
extractions.evidence: Co-CEO Jiazhen Zhao: '2026 marks the beginning of our journey into the next decade. Going into this new chapter, supply chain investment is where we will place our greatest conviction. We are committed to dedicating significant resources, with an all-in mindset, to drive lasting benefits to the entire ecosystem.' VP of Finance Jun Liu: 'These investments are firm and long-term, and will inevitably affect our financial performance.'

verification.verifier_notes: Quotes from Q4 2025 earnings call held March 25, 2026, as reported in multiple sources including Yahoo Finance and StockTitan.

extractions.claim: The market approved PDD's reinvestment thesis — stock rose 8.3% on earnings day despite 12% net income decline
extractions.evidence: PDD stock gained 8.26% to $106.23 on March 25, 2026, following the Q4/FY2025 earnings release showing revenue +12% QoQ but net income -11% QoQ. Momentum scanner triggered 59 alerts indicating high trading interest.

verification.verifier_notes: Stock price move from market data. The positive reaction despite profit decline suggests market was positioned for worse, or investors endorsed the reinvestment narrative.
